critical_findings: 7 real API keys committed in .env file (CRITICAL SECURITY)
13 unit tests broken due to stale import path (test_debug_endpoints.py)
Both Dockerfiles run containers as root
Root Dockerfile copies .env with secrets into image
No type checker (mypy/pyright) in CI or local config
pytest-timeout not installed despite being configured
health_reasoning: Build succeeds and core functionality is well-tested (143/144 non-broken tests pass = 99.3%). However, committed secrets are a critical security issue, and significant code hygiene debt exists (3,674 lint issues, 155 unformatted files). The CI pipeline is comprehensive but the environment lacks type checking.
